CustomField.description: Federal agency that issues or administers this permit type (e.g., USACE, USFWS, EPA). Populated into nepa_required_permit__c.nepa_lead_agency__c when a permit record is created.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Federal agency that issues this permit (e.g., USACE, USFWS, EPA, FERC).
CustomField.label: Lead Agency
